title: Researching Graph-RAG Tax AI Systems
description: Built and designed entity ontologies and knowledge graphs for retrieving statutory, case law, and administrative interpretation data.

title: Developing RAG-LLM Systems for environmental accessibility
Summarizing Precedents using Large Language Models
description: Applied deep learning and large language models to summarize judicial precedents and help judges understand cases more efficiently.

title: Tight Bounding Boxes for 3D Shape Decomposition
description: Conducted research on decomposing 3D meshes into tight bounding boxes using reward-driven search.

title: High-Frequency Trading Strategy using Order Book
description: Researched high-frequency trading strategies using deep learning on cryptocurrency order book data.

title: Long Term Video Prediction using VAE
description: Explored methods for addressing frame collapse in long-term video generation using VAEs and GANs.
